title: Compare Online Shipping Costs
summary: Compare total costs including shipping when shopping online.
learnerPromise: You will be able to compare the true total cost of items across different websites, including shipping and fees.
whyItMatters: A lower product price can become more expensive once shipping is added. Comparing total costs helps you find the better deal and avoid surprises at checkout.
realLifeUses: Deciding whether to buy from Site A with free shipping or Site B with a lower product price
Checking if adding one more item gets you free shipping on an order
Comparing delivery speed options when you need something quickly
Noticing a hidden handling fee right before you pay and choosing a different seller
materialsNeeded: An item you are considering buying online
result: A side-by-side comparison of total costs from at least two online sellers.
youWillLearn: How to add an item to cart and check the full total including shipping
How to find free shipping thresholds and calculate whether they are worth meeting
How to spot extra fees like handling, insurance, or express charges
How to weigh cost against delivery time for your specific need
miniChallenge: Pick one item and add it to cart on two different websites. Write down the product price, shipping cost, and final total for each.
steps: Search for the same item on two different online stores or marketplaces.
Add the item to your cart on each site and proceed to the checkout or shipping page.
Note the shipping cost, estimated delivery time, and any extra fees on each site.
Calculate the final total for each option and compare them side by side.
Choose the option that best balances total cost and delivery speed for your situation.
completionCriteria: You compared total costs from at least two online sellers
You included shipping and any extra fees in your comparison
Your choice is based on total cost, not just the listed product price
commonProblems: Shipping is calculated late in checkout — keep going until you see the full total
Different sizes or colors have different shipping costs — check the exact item you want
Free shipping may mean slower delivery — check the estimated arrival date
tips: Some stores offer free shipping over a certain amount — see if buying an extra needed item saves money overall
Check if the store has a pickup option to avoid shipping entirely
Factor in return shipping costs if you are unsure about the item
